creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
(In reply to jimmy from comment #3)

This comment supersedes the two to which it is a reply.

CHANGES:

Bug corrected that prevented binding to UNIX sockets.

Extraneous "javascript" variable removed from config file. It was
never used.

Added charset=utf-8 to Content-Type header and meta tag.

Server now accepts up to 1024 connections with every read event
on listening socket.
